Video.summary: See how fighting has impacted Jeremy Perdue's life and how he has to balance life and fighting. Does Jeremy's training pay off in the end against Chris Robinson....Find out in this episode!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue
Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue
Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue

Video.summary: Chad Anheliger is well rounded in most fight sports but has been having issues with hip flexibility and a long-term shoulder injury. After some time with Sports Conditioning coach Marie Michalski, he learns valuable skills to make him a stronger fighter.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Chad Anheliger
Video.title: After The Fight - Chad Anheliger

Image.alt: After The Fight - Chad Anheliger
After The Fight - Chad Anheliger
After The Fight - Chad Anheliger

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Derek Daku vs. Allan Bogle; Mike Geib vs. Kevin Taylor; Ethan Cornect vs. Chris Wilson; Craig Gaudry vs. Meelad Hashtee; Christian Olson vs. Nic Grandbois.

Video.summary: Motivated by watching UFC fights, Shawn Fitzsimmons was eager to start training in MMA. After a stint teaching self defense classes in Europe, Shawn is ready to prove his skills in the cage. As the main event at HK37, he takes on Ryan Dickson in the Lightweight division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Video.summary: How does one begin to return to their sport after an injury? After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Chris Smeltzer
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer
Video.title: After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer

Image.alt: After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer
After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer
After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer
